app.title: Recepto Receipt Organizer
app.tagline: Just upload a receipt: auto-organize through to report preview.

session.resetNotice: This demo resets all data and images daily at 03:00 JST. No personal data is stored.

upload.title: Upload a receipt
upload.dropHint: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select
upload.successBody: Please review and correct the extracted result.
upload.clientWrongType: Please select a JPEG or PNG file.

warnings.title: Some items need your attention
warnings.duplicate: A record with the same date, amount and store already exists. Please check.
warnings.non_positive_amount: The amount is zero or negative (possible refund). Please check.
warnings.uncategorized: The account category is not set. Please choose a category.
warnings.low_confidence_manual_input: Recognition confidence is low. Please enter the date and amount manually.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.subtitle: Review and correct extracted data, and change account categories.
receipts.empty: No receipts yet. Upload one from the form above.

aggregations.title: Monthly totals by category
aggregations.subtitle: Aggregates receipts in your session by month and category.
aggregations.empty: No receipts to aggregate for the selected year.

reports.title: Statement-style report
reports.subtitle: Preview a reference report with totals auto-filled into the expense fields.
reports.notice: This report is a reference format only and cannot be used for actual tax filing.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Please check your network and that the backend is running.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: Only JPEG or PNG are supported.
errors.OCR_UNRECOGNIZABLE: Could not recognize this as a receipt. Please try another image.
errors.OCR_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Could not reach the analysis service. Please retry later.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: There is a problem with your input.
errors.RECEIPT_NOT_FOUND: The specified receipt does not exist.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: The selected account category is invalid.
errors.INVALID_AMOUNT: Please enter the amount as an integer.
errors.INVALID_DATE_FORMAT: Please enter the date as YYYY-MM-DD.
errors.INVALID_YEAR: Please specify the year as an integer.
errors.REPORT_NOT_FOUND: The specified report does not exist.
errors.REPORT_EXPIRED: The report was removed by the daily reset. Please generate it again.
errors.PDF_GENERATION_FAILED: Failed to generate the report PDF.
errors.MASTER_NOT_SEEDED: The account category master is not initialized correctly.
